name: email
label: Email
description: Read, search, and send emails via IMAP/SMTP (any provider)

skills.name: email-skill
skills.content:
You have access to the `himalaya` CLI for email operations. Always use `--output json` for machine-readable output.

## Reading emails
```bash
himalaya envelope list --output json                    # list inbox
himalaya envelope list --output json --page-size 20     # more results
himalaya envelope list --output json -f "[Gmail]/Sent Mail"  # other folders
himalaya message read --output json <ID>                # read full message
himalaya attachment download <ID>                       # download attachments
```

## Searching emails
```bash
himalaya envelope list --output json from "alice@example.com"
himalaya envelope list --output json subject "invoice" and after 2026-01-01
himalaya envelope list --output json from "bob" or from "alice" order by date desc
himalaya envelope list --output json flag seen and subject "report"
```

## Sending emails
```bash
# Send via template on stdin
himalaya message send <<'EOF'
From: user@example.com
To: recipient@example.com
Subject: Hello

Message body here.
EOF

# Reply to a message
himalaya template reply --output json <ID>   # get reply template
himalaya message send < reply.eml            # send it

# Forward a message
himalaya template forward --output json <ID>  # get forward template
himalaya message send < forward.eml           # send it
```

## Managing emails
```bash
himalaya flag add <ID> seen                   # mark as read
himalaya flag remove <ID> seen                # mark as unread
himalaya flag add <ID> flagged                # star/flag
himalaya message move "Archives" <ID>         # move to folder
himalaya message delete <ID>                  # delete (move to trash)
himalaya folder list --output json            # list folders
```

## Key notes
- Always use `--output json` when you need to parse results
- Email IDs are returned in envelope list and are required for read/reply/forward
- For Gmail, folder aliases: inbox=INBOX, sent=[Gmail]/Sent Mail, drafts=[Gmail]/Drafts, trash=[Gmail]/Trash
- Never send emails without explicit user approval
